recommendations.title: Presencias
recommendations.overview: A man returns to his father's cabin where he spent a good part of his childhood and where his younger sister drowned.

recommendations.title: Innocent Voices
recommendations.overview: A young boy, attempting to have a normal childhood in 1980s El Salvador, is caught up in a dramatic fight for his life when he desperately tries to avoid the war that is raging all around him.

recommendations.title: When a Man Loves a Woman
recommendations.overview: An airline pilot and his wife are forced to face the consequences of her alcoholism when her addictions threaten her life and their daughter's safety. While the woman enters detox, her husband must face the truth of his enabling behavior.

recommendations.title: Angel Eyes
recommendations.overview: A story about a seemingly unlikely couple who cross paths under life-threatening circumstances as though they are destined not only to meet but to save each other's lives. Not once, but twice.

recommendations.title: Trapped
recommendations.overview: When their daughter is abducted by experienced kidnappers, the Jennings turn the tables on their seemingly fool-proof plan.

recommendations.title: White Palace
recommendations.overview: Max Baron is a Jewish advertising executive in his 20s who's still getting over the death of his wife. Nora Baker is a 40-something diner waitress who enjoys the wilder side of life. Mismatched or not, their attraction is instant and smoldering. With

recommendations.title: When Harry Met Sally...
recommendations.overview: Sex always gets in the way of friendships between men and women. At least, that's what Harry Burns believes. So when Harry meets Sally Albright and a deep friendship blossoms between them, Harry's determined not to let his attraction to Sally destroy

recommendations.title: The Precocious and Brief Life of Sabina Rivas
recommendations.overview: In the Mexican-Guatemalan border, young teenage lovers, Sabina and Jovany, both Hondurans, accidentally meet again after some years without seeing each other. She plans to get to the United States and dreams about being a great singer; he commits all

recommendations.title: Nights of Cabiria
recommendations.overview: Rome, 1957. A woman, Cabiria, is robbed and left to drown by her boyfriend, Giorgio. Rescued, she resumes her life and tries her best to find happiness in a cynical world. Even when she thinks her struggles are over and she has found happiness and co

recommendations.title: Beautiful Lies
recommendations.overview: A hairdresser forwards a passionate love letter to her widowed mother.
